creator: f451@imap.cc
text:
Hello, x11-toolkits/qt5-widgets fails to build in poudriere

OS is main-n257818

environment is

[00:00:02] Jail OSVERSION: 1400066
[00:00:02] Job Id: 01

build fails here

hasn't finished.
